title: EBNCC (Experience Bar Number Color Change)
description: Changes the color of the number on the experience bar
body:
Ever been dissatified with the tasteless green of that number on your experience bar? Ever wondered if there was any solution for your woes?

*Presenting..........*
**Experience Bar Number Color Change!**

Provides a simple config for changing the color of that awful green number!

---

![config screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/62cq29rO/images/1d9bd79cf998fc04b8a569da311f6d409a64a3ca.png)

---

Colors use ARGB formatting. That means that you can even make your number slightly transparent... or disappear completely!
